note: Committed snapshot shown when live Nostr relays are unavailable. Seeded with Lightning Linq's keyless reference skills.

skills.name: hash-digest
skills.description: Cryptographic hash of UTF-8 text (SHA-256/512, SHA-1, MD5, SHA3, BLAKE2).

skills.name: text-stats
skills.description: Word, character, line and sentence counts plus estimated reading time.

skills.name: json-csv
skills.description: Convert a JSON array of objects to CSV text, or CSV back to JSON.

skills.name: entity-extract
skills.description: Extract emails, URLs, IPv4s, and Bitcoin/Lightning identifiers from text.

skills.name: qr-generate
skills.description: Render text or a URI (e.g. a Lightning invoice) as a QR-code PNG.

skills.name: bolt11-decode
skills.description: Decode a BOLT11 Lightning invoice: amount, description, payment hash, expiry.

skills.name: markdown-html
skills.description: Render Markdown to HTML, sanitized by default to strip active markup.

skills.name: mempool-fees
skills.description: Recommended Bitcoin fee rates (sat/vB) from mempool.space.

skills.name: btc-price
skills.description: Current BTC price in a fiat currency (USD/EUR/GBP and more).

skills.name: weather
skills.description: Current weather (temperature, windspeed) for a latitude/longitude.

skills.name: geocode
skills.description: Resolve a place name to coordinates via open geocoding.

skills.name: nostr-profile
skills.description: Look up a Nostr profile (name, nip05, lud16) by pubkey (hex or npub).

skills.name: opentimestamps
skills.description: Create an OpenTimestamps proof committing a SHA-256 hash to Bitcoin.

skills.name: pdf-text
skills.description: Extract text from a PDF document (up to 50 pages).

skills.name: image-convert
skills.description: Convert an image between PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF and BMP.
